The '''Hegemony theater''' was the campaign by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] against the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] of [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], just after the death of [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==History==
After Thrawn's death, the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] decided to make a quick move against local [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] to show that they had not been as hamstrung by the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] as might have appeared. Delak Krennel was chosen due to his [[Evacuation of Ciutric|murder]] of [[Grand Vizier/Legends|Grand Vizier]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] several years earlier, and had continued to support his reign by bloody purges and repressing non-humans.

The choice was seen as controversial by many, as Krennel had been relatively quiet since his rise to power and had not attempted to move outside the Hegemony. Aided by [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|Ysanne Isard's clone]], Krennel had helped this image by speaking out against [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]], apologizing for the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]], admitting the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] had committed many wrong acts, and offering a refuge to [[Human/Legends|Humans]] displaced by the New Republic's policies of reversing Imperial [[High Human Culture/Legends|Human High Culture]]. As the policy continued, they were approached or had been approached by a number of refugee groups and other former Imperials, including [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] refugees. They also had sent word to [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] about bringing [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|Thrawn's fleet]] into the Hegemony.

However, the tide began to turn against them after the discovery of the plans for the [[Pulsar Station]], a [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]-like superweapon. In reality, the plans were false and had been planted by the real [[Ysanne Isard]], who helped a New Republic force led by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] liberate the Hegemony and kill Krennel.
